title: Fixed Shields
description: Removes the 5s delay that minecraft is hardcoded too with the shields
body:
Delay with the shields are now removed;

Minecraft is hardcoded to a 5 tick delay on shields when they are used
This Fabric Mod removes that 5 tick delay allowing it to be as smooth and responsive as possible.

Will at some point allow it to be on more versions but this is personally for my own modpack thought I might release it
